definitions.zh: 执行尝试与结果是以执行为关键概念的本体边界；Execution、RunAttempt、RetryActivity 与尝试血缘。 其成员归属遵循：当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Execution attempts and outcomes is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion Execution; Execution, RunAttempt, RetryActivity, and attempt lineage. Membership follows: Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.
definitions.ja: 実行試行と結果は実行を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。Execution、RunAttempt、RetryActivity、attempt lineage。 所属判定は次に従います：対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 统一描述工作执行、首次与重试尝试、预算消耗、结果和受控 Outcome，使每次发生与其定义清晰分离。
purpose.en: Uniformly describe work execution, initial and retry attempts, budget use, results, and controlled Outcome values, keeping each occurrence separate from its definition.
purpose.ja: 作業実行、初回・再試行、予算消費、結果、統制 Outcome を統一記述し、各発生を定義から明確に分離します。

includes.en: Execution, RunAttempt, RetryActivity, and attempt lineage.

includes.zh: RunResult、RunOutcome、成功失败取消受控值，以及 RuntimeBudget 的时间、成本、token 和调用维度。
includes.en: RunResult, RunOutcome, controlled success, failure, or cancel values, and RuntimeBudget dimensions for time, cost, tokens, and calls.
includes.ja: RunResult、RunOutcome、controlled success/failure/cancel value、および RuntimeBudget の time・cost・token・call dimension。

excludes.zh: Task、Plan、Step 和完成标准的规范定义归目标与任务规划；Execution 通过 realizes 指向它们。
excludes.en: Normative Task, Plan, Step, and completion-criterion definitions belong to goals and task planning; Execution points to them through realizes.
excludes.ja: 規範的 Task、Plan、Step、完了基準定義は目標とタスク計画に属し、Execution は realizes で参照します。

excludes.zh: InvocationSpecification、Invocation、InvocationEffect 和工具专用错误归调用与执行；ToolCallAttempt 通过显式关系对齐这里的 RunAttempt。
excludes.en: InvocationSpecification, Invocation, InvocationEffect, and tool-specific errors belong to invocation and execution; ToolCallAttempt aligns to RunAttempt through explicit relations.
excludes.ja: InvocationSpecification、Invocation、InvocationEffect、tool-specific error は invocation/execution に属し、ToolCallAttempt は explicit relation で RunAttempt と整合します。

description.zh: 执行尝试与结果的输入概念族为任务、上下文包、运行环境；责任交接由已接受事实 执行尝试 —run_attempt_belongs_to_task→ 任务 (run_attempt_belongs_to_task)；上下文包 —delivered_to→ 执行尝试 (ContextPackage-delivered_to-RunAttempt)；执行尝试 —occurs_in→ 运行环境 (RunAttempt-occurs_in-RuntimeEnvironment) 明确给出。
description.en: The input families for Execution attempts and outcomes are task, context package, runtime environment; the accepted facts run attempt —run_attempt_belongs_to_task→ task (run_attempt_belongs_to_task); context package —delivered_to→ run attempt (ContextPackage-delivered_to-RunAttempt); run attempt —occurs_in→ runtime environment (RunAttempt-occurs_in-RuntimeEnvironment) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 実行試行と結果の入力概念族はタスク、コンテキストパッケージ、実行環境です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 実行試行 —run_attempt_belongs_to_task→ タスク (run_attempt_belongs_to_task)；コンテキストパッケージ —delivered_to→ 実行試行 (ContextPackage-delivered_to-RunAttempt)；実行試行 —occurs_in→ 実行環境 (RunAttempt-occurs_in-RuntimeEnvironment) により明示されます。

description.zh: 执行尝试与结果的输出概念族为执行产出记录、执行结局；责任交接由已接受事实 执行尝试 —produces→ 执行产出记录 (RunAttempt-produces-RunResult)；执行产出记录 —evidences→ 执行结局 (RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome) 明确给出。
description.en: The output families for Execution attempts and outcomes are Run result record, Run outcome; the accepted facts run attempt —produces→ Run result record (RunAttempt-produces-RunResult); Run result record —evidences→ Run outcome (RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 実行試行と結果の出力概念族は実行成果記録、実行結果状態です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 実行試行 —produces→ 実行成果記録 (RunAttempt-produces-RunResult)；実行成果記録 —evidences→ 実行結果状態 (RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome) により明示されます。

description.zh: 执行尝试与结果的失败概念族为阻断错误、执行尝试；责任交接由已接受事实 阻断错误 —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 执行尝试 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt) 明确给出。
description.en: The failure families for Execution attempts and outcomes are blocking error, run attempt; the accepted facts blocking error —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ run attempt (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 実行試行と結果の失敗概念族はブロッキングエラー、実行試行です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 ブロッキングエラー —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 実行試行 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt) により明示されます。

description.zh: 执行尝试与结果的恢复概念族为执行尝试、重试策略；责任交接由已接受事实 重试活动 —creates→ 执行尝试 (RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt)；重试活动 —governed_by→ 重试策略 (RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy) 明确给出。
description.en: The recovery families for Execution attempts and outcomes are run attempt, retry policy; the accepted facts Retry activity —creates→ run attempt (RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt); Retry activity —governed_by→ retry policy (RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 実行試行と結果の回復概念族は実行試行、再試行ポリシーです。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 再試行活動 —creates→ 実行試行 (RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt)；再試行活動 —governed_by→ 再試行ポリシー (RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy) により明示されます。

decision_note.zh: 执行尝试与结果与调用与执行按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Execution attempts and outcomes and Invocation and execution are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 実行試行と結果と呼び出しと実行は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 执行尝试与结果与调用与执行按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Execution attempts and outcomes and Invocation and execution are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 実行試行と結果と呼び出しと実行は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.en: Execution attempts and outcomes and Invocation and execution are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 実行試行と結果と呼び出しと実行は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.en: Execution attempts and outcomes and Invocation and execution are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 実行試行と結果と呼び出しと実行は一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

labels.zh: 一次 Execution 有哪些按序 Attempt，哪些是重试，它们分别由什么失败和策略触发？：正例
labels.en: Which ordered Attempts belong to an Execution, which are retries, and which failure and policy triggered each?: positive case
labels.ja: 一つの Execution にはどの順序付き Attempt があり、どれが再試行で、各々をどの失敗と方針が起動しましたか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：重试活动 —governed_by→ 重试策略 (RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: Retry activity —governed_by→ retry policy (RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：再試行活動 —governed_by→ 再試行ポリシー (RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：There is one initial attempt; every retry has exactly one predecessor and explicit trigger evidence, with no sequence gaps.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: There is one initial attempt; every retry has exactly one predecessor and explicit trigger evidence, with no sequence gaps.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：There is one initial attempt; every retry has exactly one predecessor and explicit trigger evidence, with no sequence gaps.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-langgraph-docs at Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ runtime-execution-attempts-cq-attempt-lineage-v3 (runtime-execution-attempts.attempt-lineage), owned by runtime-execution-attempts and compared with orchestration-routing-control. The source does not define Moonweave CQ runtime-execution-attempts-cq-attempt-lineage-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Traverse Execution has_attempt ordered by attempt number, then follow retry trigger, predecessor, failure evidence, and policy references." and expected assertion "There is one initial attempt; every retry has exactly one predecessor and explicit trigger evidence, with no sequence gaps." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

labels.zh: 一次 Execution 有哪些按序 Attempt，哪些是重试，它们分别由什么失败和策略触发？：反例
labels.en: Which ordered Attempts belong to an Execution, which are retries, and which failure and policy triggered each?: counterexample
labels.ja: 一つの Execution にはどの順序付き Attempt があり、どれが再試行で、各々をどの失敗と方針が起動しましたか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“一次 Execution 有哪些按序 Attempt，哪些是重试，它们分别由什么失败和策略触发？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Which ordered Attempts belong to an Execution, which are retries, and which failure and policy triggered each?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「一つの Execution にはどの順序付き Attempt があり、どれが再試行で、各々をどの失敗と方針が起動しましたか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

labels.zh: 某次 Attempt 产生了什么 Result，其 Outcome 为成功、失败还是取消，判断证据是什么？：正例
labels.en: What Result did an Attempt produce, is its Outcome success, failure, or cancellation, and what evidence supports that judgment?: positive case
labels.ja: ある Attempt はどの Result を生成し、Outcome は成功、失敗、取消のどれで、判断証拠は何ですか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：阻断错误 —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 执行尝试 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: blocking error —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ run attempt (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：ブロッキングエラー —blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt→ 実行試行 (blocking_error_blocks_run_attempt)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Result and Outcome remain distinct; the controlled outcome is supported by occurrence evidence rather than modeled as a result subtype.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Result and Outcome remain distinct; the controlled outcome is supported by occurrence evidence rather than modeled as a result subtype.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Result and Outcome remain distinct; the controlled outcome is supported by occurrence evidence rather than modeled as a result subtype.

why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.

labels.zh: 某项 Execution 在各次 Attempt 中消耗了多少时间、成本、token 和调用额度，是否超过预算？：正例
labels.en: How much time, cost, token, and call allowance did an Execution consume across Attempts, and did it exceed budget?: positive case

labels.zh: 某项 Execution 在各次 Attempt 中消耗了多少时间、成本、token 和调用额度，是否超过预算？：反例
labels.en: How much time, cost, token, and call allowance did an Execution consume across Attempts, and did it exceed budget?: counterexample

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“某项 Execution 在各次 Attempt 中消耗了多少时间、成本、token 和调用额度，是否超过预算？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “How much time, cost, token, and call allowance did an Execution consume across Attempts, and did it exceed budget?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「Execution は各 Attempt で時間、コスト、token、呼出枠をどれだけ消費し、予算を超えましたか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

owns_when.zh: 当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.
owns_when.ja: 対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 计划、工具、路由、诊断或产物需要说明某个结果在哪次尝试中产生时，引用 Execution、Attempt 和 Result。
references_when.en: Planning, tools, routing, diagnostics, or artifacts references Execution, Attempt, and Result when identifying the attempt that produced an outcome.
references_when.ja: 計画、ツール、経路制御、診断、成果物が結果を生成した試行を示すとき、Execution、Attempt、Result を参照します。

rationale.zh: 执行尝试与结果拥有跨能力类型复用的 Execution、Attempt、Result、Outcome 和预算；调用与执行拥有工具调用规范、Invocation、Effect 与工具专用错误。 本条仅记录 RunAttempt、RunOutcome；其 canonical owner 是执行尝试与结果（runtime-execution-attempts），因此 runtime-execution-attempts 在此拥有这些概念。
rationale.en: Execution attempts and outcomes own capability-neutral Execution, Attempt, Result, Outcome, and budget semantics; invocation and execution own tool-call specifications, Invocation, Effect, and tool-specific errors. This record is limited to RunAttempt, RunOutcome; their canonical owner is Execution attempts and outcomes (runtime-execution-attempts), so runtime-execution-attempts owns these concepts here.
rationale.ja: 実行試行と結果は能力種別に依存しない Execution、Attempt、Result、Outcome、予算を所有し、呼出しと実行はツール呼出仕様、Invocation、Effect、ツール固有エラーを所有します。 この記録は RunAttempt、RunOutcome だけを対象とし、canonical owner は実行試行と結果（runtime-execution-attempts）です。したがって runtime-execution-attempts はここでこれらを所有します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-langgraph-docs at Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs supports operational notions used to compare runtime-execution-attempts with tool-invocation-execution, including RunAttempt, RunOutcome. The source does not define Moonweave Modules runtime-execution-attempts or tool-invocation-execution, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under runtime-execution-attempts's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "If removing tool definition and arguments leaves a complete execution attempt, it belongs to execution attempts and outcomes; if identity depends on a concrete tool call, it belongs to invocation and execution."; result=owns and owner=runtime-execution-attempts are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

overlap_reason.zh: RetryPolicy 可允许最多多次重试，但只有实际 RunAttempt 才消费预算并产生结果；未触发的策略不是尝试。 本条仅记录 RetryPolicy、RoutingCondition；其 canonical owner 是路由与门控（orchestration-routing-control），因此 runtime-execution-attempts 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: RetryPolicy can allow several retries, but only actual RunAttempt consumes budget and produces a result; an untriggered policy is not an attempt. semantic_area.en: Terminal outcome versus diagnostic failure semantics
semantic_area.ja: terminal outcome と diagnostic failure 意味

overlap_reason.zh: Outcome=failed 说明尝试终止状态，但不自动给出可复现 FailureMode、严重性或修复建议。 本条仅记录 BlockingError、FailureEvent；其 canonical owner 是故障与诊断（feedback-warning-error），因此 runtime-execution-attempts 在此引用这些概念。

disambiguation_test.en: An object identifiable by attempt ID and terminal value belongs to execution attempts; one requiring observation interpretation, mode classification, or root-cause chain belongs to failures and diagnostics.

disambiguation_test.ja: attempt id と terminal value で識別できれば execution attempt、observation interpretation・mode classification・root-cause chain が必要なら failure/diagnostic に属します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-langgraph-docs at Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs supports operational notions used to compare runtime-execution-attempts with feedback-warning-error, including RunAttempt, RunResult. The source does not define Moonweave Modules runtime-execution-attempts or feedback-warning-error, their class or relation placement, or their ownership split. Under runtime-execution-attempts's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "An object identifiable by attempt ID and terminal value belongs to execution attempts; one requiring observation interpretation, mode classification, or root-cause chain belongs to failures and diagnostics."; result=distinct and owner=runtime-execution-attempts are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.
source_claims.locator: Overview > Durable execution, human-in-the-loop, memory, and subgraphs

Under runtime-execution-attempts's owns_when "Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.", Moonweave applies the disambiguation test "An object identifiable by attempt ID and terminal value belongs to execution attempts; one requiring observation interpretation, mode classification, or root-cause chain belongs to failures and diagnostics."; result=distinct and owner=runtime-execution-attempts are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.

short_definitions.zh: 执行是主体在运行环境中依照计划或调用规范完成工作并产生可观察结果的活动。
short_definitions.en: Execution is the activity in which a participant performs work in a runtime environment under a plan or invocation specification and produces an observable outcome.
short_definitions.ja: 実行は活動の一種であり、参加者が実行環境で計画または呼び出し仕様に従って作業し、観測可能な結果を生みます。

definitions.zh: 执行是主体在运行环境中依照计划或调用规范完成工作并产生可观察结果的活动。
definitions.en: Execution is the activity in which a participant performs work in a runtime environment under a plan or invocation specification and produces an observable outcome.
definitions.ja: 実行は活動の一種であり、参加者が実行環境で計画または呼び出し仕様に従って作業し、観測可能な結果を生みます。

why_needed.zh: 执行为canonical 事实 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt（Execution has_attempt RunAttempt）提供明确端点并保持与 RunAttempt 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Execution provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt (Execution has_attempt RunAttempt) while preserving its reviewed boundary from RunAttempt.
why_needed.ja: 実行はcanonical 事実 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt（Execution has_attempt RunAttempt）の明確な端点を提供し、RunAttempt との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的执行：执行是主体在运行环境中依照计划或调用规范完成工作并产生可观察结果的活动。；该种差可由关系 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Execution records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Execution is the activity in which a participant performs work in a runtime environment under a plan or invocation specification and produces an observable outcome. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす実行を含みます：実行は活動の一種であり、参加者が実行環境で計画または呼び出し仕様に従って作業し、観測可能な結果を生みます。 種差は関係 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 执行尝试只是关系 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt 的另一端；相关联不表示它是执行。
excludes.en: RunAttempt is only the other endpoint of Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt; relatedness does not make it a Execution.
excludes.ja: RunAttempt は Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで Execution にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次带追踪与重试的任务执行中，系统将执行（Execution）记录为 Execution has_attempt RunAttempt 的源端点。其已审查定义是“执行是主体在运行环境中依照计划或调用规范完成工作并产生可观察结果的活动”。
descriptions.en: During a traced task execution with retries, the system records Execution (Execution) as the source of Execution has_attempt RunAttempt. Its reviewed definition is “Execution is the activity in which a participant performs work in a runtime environment under a plan or invocation specification and produces an observable outcome”.
descriptions.ja: 追跡と再試行を伴うタスク実行では、システムは実行（Execution）を Execution has_attempt RunAttempt の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「実行は活動の一種であり、参加者が実行環境で計画または呼び出し仕様に従って作業し、観測可能な結果を生みます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 Execution 以及方向保持不变的事实 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt。
expected_result.en: The run can query Execution together with direction-preserving fact Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt.
expected_result.ja: この実行では Execution と方向を保持した事実 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: RunAttempt 用作Execution的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 RunAttempt 的已审查定义是“执行尝试是一种执行；其区分条件是：它是有起止和重试谱系的运行活动；它属于会话但不是会话的子类。”。不能因 relation Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt 而把它归入Execution。
descriptions.en: RunAttempt is the boundary contrast for Execution. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but RunAttempt's reviewed definition is “As an Execution, Run attempt is distinguished by the fact that it is a bounded activity with retry lineage; it belongs to a session but is not a subtype of RuntimeSession.”. relation Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt does not make it a Execution.
descriptions.ja: RunAttempt は Execution の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、RunAttempt の審査済み定義は「実行に属する実行試行は、次の事実を種差とします：それは開始・終了と再試行系譜を持つ活動であり、セッションに属するが RuntimeSession の下位型ではない。」です。relation Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt だけで Execution にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: RunAttempt 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Execution。
expected_result.en: RunAttempt retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Execution from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: RunAttempt は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Execution へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、Execution-has_attempt-RunAttempt の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 Execution（执行）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms Execution (Execution) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は Execution（実行）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 Execution 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 reviewed root module-key-root，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=root_status=module-key-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Execution has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone reviewed root module-key-root, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=root_status=module-key-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は Execution の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が reviewed root module-key-root であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=root_status=module-key-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: Execution 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for Execution were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: Execution の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 执行已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Execution was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 実行は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 重试活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它根据适用重试策略和前序尝试证据创建新的执行尝试，同时保留 lineage、序号和预算。
short_definitions.en: Retry activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it creates a new run attempt under an applicable retry policy and predecessor evidence while retaining lineage, attempt number, and budget.
short_definitions.ja: 再試行活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは適用再試行ポリシーと先行試行証拠に基づき新しい実行試行を作り、lineage、試行番号、予算を保持します。

definitions.zh: 重试活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它根据适用重试策略和前序尝试证据创建新的执行尝试，同时保留 lineage、序号和预算。
definitions.en: Retry activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it creates a new run attempt under an applicable retry policy and predecessor evidence while retaining lineage, attempt number, and budget.
definitions.ja: 再試行活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは適用再試行ポリシーと先行試行証拠に基づき新しい実行試行を作り、lineage、試行番号、予算を保持します。

why_needed.zh: 重试活动为canonical 事实 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt（RetryActivity creates RunAttempt）提供明确端点并保持与 RunAttempt 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Retry activity provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt (RetryActivity creates RunAttempt) while preserving its reviewed boundary from RunAttempt.
why_needed.ja: 再試行活動はcanonical 事実 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt（RetryActivity creates RunAttempt）の明確な端点を提供し、RunAttempt との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的重试活动：重试活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它根据适用重试策略和前序尝试证据创建新的执行尝试，同时保留 lineage、序号和预算。；该种差可由关系 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Retry activity records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Retry activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it creates a new run attempt under an applicable retry policy and predecessor evidence while retaining lineage, attempt number, and budget. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす再試行活動を含みます：再試行活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは適用再試行ポリシーと先行試行証拠に基づき新しい実行試行を作り、lineage、試行番号、予算を保持します。 種差は関係 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 执行尝试只是关系 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt 的另一端；相关联不表示它是重试活动。
excludes.en: RunAttempt is only the other endpoint of RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt; relatedness does not make it a RetryActivity.
excludes.ja: RunAttempt は RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで RetryActivity にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次带追踪与重试的任务执行中，系统将重试活动（RetryActivity）记录为 RetryActivity creates RunAttempt 的源端点。其已审查定义是“重试活动是以如下事实为区分特征的活动：它根据适用重试策略和前序尝试证据创建新的执行尝试，同时保留 lineage、序号和预算”。
descriptions.en: During a traced task execution with retries, the system records Retry activity (RetryActivity) as the source of RetryActivity creates RunAttempt. Its reviewed definition is “Retry activity is an activity; its differentiating condition is that it creates a new run attempt under an applicable retry policy and predecessor evidence while retaining lineage, attempt number, and budget”.
descriptions.ja: 追跡と再試行を伴うタスク実行では、システムは再試行活動（RetryActivity）を RetryActivity creates RunAttempt の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「再試行活動は活動の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは適用再試行ポリシーと先行試行証拠に基づき新しい実行試行を作り、lineage、試行番号、予算を保持します」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 RetryActivity 以及方向保持不变的事实 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt。
expected_result.en: The run can query RetryActivity together with direction-preserving fact RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt.
expected_result.ja: この実行では RetryActivity と方向を保持した事実 RetryActivity-creates-RunAttempt を共に照会できます。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RetryActivity（重试活动）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RetryActivity (Retry activity) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RetryActivity（再試行活動）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RetryActivity 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 reviewed root composition-root，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=root_status=composition-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms RetryActivity has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone reviewed root composition-root, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は RetryActivity の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が reviewed root composition-root であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: RetryActivity 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for RetryActivity were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: RetryActivity の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 重试活动已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Retry activity was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 再試行活動は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 执行尝试是一种执行；其区分条件是：它是有起止和重试谱系的运行活动；它属于会话但不是会话的子类。
short_definitions.en: As an Execution, Run attempt is distinguished by the fact that it is a bounded activity with retry lineage; it belongs to a session but is not a subtype of RuntimeSession.
short_definitions.ja: 実行に属する実行試行は、次の事実を種差とします：それは開始・終了と再試行系譜を持つ活動であり、セッションに属するが RuntimeSession の下位型ではない。

definitions.zh: 执行尝试是一种执行；其区分条件是：它是有起止和重试谱系的运行活动；它属于会话但不是会话的子类。
definitions.en: As an Execution, Run attempt is distinguished by the fact that it is a bounded activity with retry lineage; it belongs to a session but is not a subtype of RuntimeSession.
definitions.ja: 実行に属する実行試行は、次の事実を種差とします：それは開始・終了と再試行系譜を持つ活動であり、セッションに属するが RuntimeSession の下位型ではない。

why_needed.zh: 执行尝试为canonical 事实 run_attempt_belongs_to_task（RunAttempt run_attempt_belongs_to_task Task）提供明确端点并保持与 Execution 的定义边界；节点字段 attempt_number、status、duration_ms 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: run attempt provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact run_attempt_belongs_to_task (RunAttempt run_attempt_belongs_to_task Task) while preserving its reviewed boundary from Execution; node fields attempt_number, status, duration_ms make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 実行試行はcanonical 事実 run_attempt_belongs_to_task（RunAttempt run_attempt_belongs_to_task Task）の明確な端点を提供し、Execution との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 attempt_number、status、duration_ms によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的执行尝试：执行尝试是一种执行；其区分条件是：它是有起止和重试谱系的运行活动；它属于会话但不是会话的子类。；该种差可由字段 attempt_number、status、duration_ms 检验。
includes.en: Includes run attempt records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an Execution, Run attempt is distinguished by the fact that it is a bounded activity with retry lineage; it belongs to a session but is not a subtype of RuntimeSession. The differentia can be checked through fields attempt_number, status, duration_ms.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす実行試行を含みます：実行に属する実行試行は、次の事実を種差とします：それは開始・終了と再試行系譜を持つ活動であり、セッションに属するが RuntimeSession の下位型ではない。 種差は項目 attempt_number、status、duration_ms で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 仅能识别为上位概念 Execution 的对象不在范围内；它尚未证明执行尝试的种差或关系端点 run_attempt_belongs_to_task。
excludes.en: An object identified only as broader concept Execution is excluded until it proves RunAttempt's differentia or its endpoint role in run_attempt_belongs_to_task.
excludes.ja: 上位概念 Execution としか識別できない対象は、RunAttempt の種差または run_attempt_belongs_to_task の端点役割を証明するまで範囲外です。

descriptions.zh: 在一次带追踪与重试的任务执行中，系统将执行尝试（RunAttempt）记录为 RunAttempt run_attempt_belongs_to_task Task 的源端点。其已审查定义是“执行尝试是一种执行；其区分条件是：它是有起止和重试谱系的运行活动；它属于会话但不是会话的子类”。记录同时写入经审查字段 status="blocked", duration_ms=1250, retry_count=1, legacy_status_text="running", attempt_number=2。
descriptions.en: During a traced task execution with retries, the system records run attempt (RunAttempt) as the source of RunAttempt run_attempt_belongs_to_task Task. Its reviewed definition is “As an Execution, Run attempt is distinguished by the fact that it is a bounded activity with retry lineage; it belongs to a session but is not a subtype of RuntimeSession”. The record also binds reviewed fields status="blocked", duration_ms=1250, retry_count=1, legacy_status_text="running", attempt_number=2.
descriptions.ja: 追跡と再試行を伴うタスク実行では、システムは実行試行（RunAttempt）を RunAttempt run_attempt_belongs_to_task Task の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「実行に属する実行試行は、次の事実を種差とします：それは開始・終了と再試行系譜を持つ活動であり、セッションに属するが RuntimeSession の下位型ではない」です。記録には審査済み項目 status="blocked", duration_ms=1250, retry_count=1, legacy_status_text="running", attempt_number=2 も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 RunAttempt 以及方向保持不变的事实 run_attempt_belongs_to_task。
expected_result.en: The run can query RunAttempt together with direction-preserving fact run_attempt_belongs_to_task.
expected_result.ja: この実行では RunAttempt と方向を保持した事実 run_attempt_belongs_to_task を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、run_attempt_belongs_to_task 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of run_attempt_belongs_to_task, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、run_attempt_belongs_to_task の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: Execution 用作RunAttempt的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 Execution 的已审查定义是“执行是主体在运行环境中依照计划或调用规范完成工作并产生可观察结果的活动。”。不能因 relation run_attempt_belongs_to_task 而把它归入RunAttempt。
descriptions.en: Execution is the boundary contrast for RunAttempt. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but Execution's reviewed definition is “Execution is the activity in which a participant performs work in a runtime environment under a plan or invocation specification and produces an observable outcome.”. relation run_attempt_belongs_to_task does not make it a RunAttempt.
descriptions.ja: Execution は RunAttempt の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、Execution の審査済み定義は「実行は活動の一種であり、参加者が実行環境で計画または呼び出し仕様に従って作業し、観測可能な結果を生みます。」です。relation run_attempt_belongs_to_task だけで RunAttempt にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: Execution 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 RunAttempt。
expected_result.en: Execution retains its own type; validation must not promote it to RunAttempt from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: Execution は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで RunAttempt へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 run_attempt_belongs_to_task 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of run_attempt_belongs_to_task; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、run_attempt_belongs_to_task の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RunAttempt（执行尝试）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RunAttempt (run attempt) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RunAttempt（実行試行）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RunAttempt 的 semantic kind 为 activity，主父或骨架为 RunAttempt-is_a-Execution，并满足“semantic kind=activity；backbone=RunAttempt-is_a-Execution；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms RunAttempt has semantic kind activity, primary parent or backbone RunAttempt-is_a-Execution, and invariants “semantic kind=activity; backbone=RunAttempt-is_a-Execution; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は RunAttempt の semantic kind が activity、主親または骨格が RunAttempt-is_a-Execution であり、「semantic kind=activity、backbone=RunAttempt-is_a-Execution、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: RunAttempt 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for RunAttempt were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: RunAttempt の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 执行尝试已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: run attempt was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 実行試行は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，执行结局由这一事实区分：它只表达一次执行尝试最终成功、失败或取消，不承载该尝试产生的内容、引用、日志或工具返回值。
short_definitions.en: Run outcome belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it expresses only whether one run attempt ultimately succeeded, failed, or was cancelled; it does not carry content, citations, logs, or tool return values produced by the attempt.
short_definitions.ja: 実行結果状態は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは一回の実行試行が最終的に成功、失敗、取消のどれで終わったかだけを表し、その試行が生成した内容、引用、ログ、ツール戻り値を保持しません。

definitions.zh: 作为信息记录，执行结局由这一事实区分：它只表达一次执行尝试最终成功、失败或取消，不承载该尝试产生的内容、引用、日志或工具返回值。
definitions.en: Run outcome belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it expresses only whether one run attempt ultimately succeeded, failed, or was cancelled; it does not carry content, citations, logs, or tool return values produced by the attempt.
definitions.ja: 実行結果状態は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは一回の実行試行が最終的に成功、失敗、取消のどれで終わったかだけを表し、その試行が生成した内容、引用、ログ、ツール戻り値を保持しません。

why_needed.zh: 执行结局为canonical 事实 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome（BenchmarkAdapter maps_success_to RunOutcome）提供明确端点并保持与 BenchmarkAdapter 的定义边界；节点字段 run_attempt_id、outcome_code 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: Run outcome provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome (BenchmarkAdapter maps_success_to RunOutcome) while preserving its reviewed boundary from BenchmarkAdapter; node fields run_attempt_id, outcome_code make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 実行結果状態はcanonical 事実 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome（BenchmarkAdapter maps_success_to RunOutcome）の明確な端点を提供し、BenchmarkAdapter との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 run_attempt_id、outcome_code によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的执行结局：作为信息记录，执行结局由这一事实区分：它只表达一次执行尝试最终成功、失败或取消，不承载该尝试产生的内容、引用、日志或工具返回值。；该种差可由字段 run_attempt_id、outcome_code 检验。
includes.en: Includes Run outcome records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Run outcome belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it expresses only whether one run attempt ultimately succeeded, failed, or was cancelled; it does not carry content, citations, logs, or tool return values produced by the attempt. The differentia can be checked through fields run_attempt_id, outcome_code.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす実行結果状態を含みます：実行結果状態は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは一回の実行試行が最終的に成功、失敗、取消のどれで終わったかだけを表し、その試行が生成した内容、引用、ログ、ツール戻り値を保持しません。 種差は項目 run_attempt_id、outcome_code で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 基准适配器只是关系 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome 的另一端；相关联不表示它是执行结局。
excludes.en: BenchmarkAdapter is only the other endpoint of BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome; relatedness does not make it a RunOutcome.
excludes.ja: BenchmarkAdapter は BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで RunOutcome にはなりません。

definitions.zh: 唯一标识该结局所归属的执行尝试。
definitions.en: Uniquely identifies the run attempt to which this outcome belongs.
definitions.ja: この結果状態が属する実行試行を一意に識別します。

descriptions.zh: 在一次带追踪与重试的任务执行中，系统将执行结局（RunOutcome）记录为 BenchmarkAdapter maps_success_to RunOutcome 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“作为信息记录，执行结局由这一事实区分：它只表达一次执行尝试最终成功、失败或取消，不承载该尝试产生的内容、引用、日志或工具返回值”。记录同时写入经审查字段 run_attempt_id="run-attempt-0187", outcome_code="succeeded"。
descriptions.en: During a traced task execution with retries, the system records Run outcome (RunOutcome) as the target of BenchmarkAdapter maps_success_to RunOutcome. Its reviewed definition is “Run outcome belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it expresses only whether one run attempt ultimately succeeded, failed, or was cancelled; it does not carry content, citations, logs, or tool return values produced by the attempt”. The record also binds reviewed fields run_attempt_id="run-attempt-0187", outcome_code="succeeded".
descriptions.ja: 追跡と再試行を伴うタスク実行では、システムは実行結果状態（RunOutcome）を BenchmarkAdapter maps_success_to RunOutcome の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「実行結果状態は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは一回の実行試行が最終的に成功、失敗、取消のどれで終わったかだけを表し、その試行が生成した内容、引用、ログ、ツール戻り値を保持しません」です。記録には審査済み項目 run_attempt_id="run-attempt-0187", outcome_code="succeeded" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 RunOutcome 以及方向保持不变的事实 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome。
expected_result.en: The run can query RunOutcome together with direction-preserving fact BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome.
expected_result.ja: この実行では RunOutcome と方向を保持した事実 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: BenchmarkAdapter 用作RunOutcome的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 BenchmarkAdapter 的已审查定义是“基准适配器是一种适配器；其区分条件是：它把基准任务、场景、环境、评分规则、指标、观察、用户模拟、产物和压力轴映射到评估剖面，同时不改变核心本体。”。不能因 relation BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome 而把它归入RunOutcome。
descriptions.en: BenchmarkAdapter is the boundary contrast for RunOutcome. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but BenchmarkAdapter's reviewed definition is “As an adapter, Benchmark adapter is distinguished by the fact that it is an adapter family that maps benchmark tasks, scenarios, environments, scoring rubrics, metrics, observations, user simulations, artifacts, and pressure axes into evaluation profiles without changing ontology core.”. relation BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome does not make it a RunOutcome.
descriptions.ja: BenchmarkAdapter は RunOutcome の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、BenchmarkAdapter の審査済み定義は「アダプターに属するベンチマークアダプターは、次の事実を種差とします：ベンチマークアダプタ族は、ベンチマークのタスク、シナリオ、環境、採点規則、指標、観測、ユーザーシミュレーション、成果物、負荷軸を評価プロファイルへ写像し、コアオントロジーを変更しません。」です。relation BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome だけで RunOutcome にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: BenchmarkAdapter 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 RunOutcome。
expected_result.en: BenchmarkAdapter retains its own type; validation must not promote it to RunOutcome from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: BenchmarkAdapter は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで RunOutcome へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、BenchmarkAdapter-maps_success_to-RunOutcome の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RunOutcome（执行结局）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RunOutcome (Run outcome) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RunOutcome（実行結果状態）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RunOutcome 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms RunOutcome has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は RunOutcome の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: RunOutcome 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for RunOutcome were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: RunOutcome の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 执行结局已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Run outcome was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 実行結果状態は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 执行产出记录是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它是一次执行尝试实际产生的内容、引用、产物指针、工具返回值和诊断证据的可寻址信息记录；它与成功、失败或取消的终局状态分离。
short_definitions.en: As an information record, Run result record is distinguished by the fact that it is addressable information containing the content, citations, artifact pointers, tool return values, and diagnostic evidence actually produced by one run attempt; it is separate from the terminal succeeded, failed, or cancelled disposition.
short_definitions.ja: 情報記録に属する実行成果記録は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、一回の実行試行が実際に生成した内容、引用、成果物ポインター、ツール戻り値、診断証拠を保持するアドレス可能な情報であり、成功、失敗、取消の終局状態とは分離されます。

definitions.zh: 执行产出记录是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它是一次执行尝试实际产生的内容、引用、产物指针、工具返回值和诊断证据的可寻址信息记录；它与成功、失败或取消的终局状态分离。
definitions.en: As an information record, Run result record is distinguished by the fact that it is addressable information containing the content, citations, artifact pointers, tool return values, and diagnostic evidence actually produced by one run attempt; it is separate from the terminal succeeded, failed, or cancelled disposition.
definitions.ja: 情報記録に属する実行成果記録は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、一回の実行試行が実際に生成した内容、引用、成果物ポインター、ツール戻り値、診断証拠を保持するアドレス可能な情報であり、成功、失敗、取消の終局状態とは分離されます。

why_needed.zh: 执行产出记录为canonical 事实 RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome（RunResult evidences RunOutcome）提供明确端点并保持与 RunOutcome 的定义边界；节点字段 result_id、run_attempt_id 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: Run result record provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome (RunResult evidences RunOutcome) while preserving its reviewed boundary from RunOutcome; node fields result_id, run_attempt_id make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 実行成果記録はcanonical 事実 RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome（RunResult evidences RunOutcome）の明確な端点を提供し、RunOutcome との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 result_id、run_attempt_id によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的执行产出记录：执行产出记录是一种信息记录；其区分条件是：它是一次执行尝试实际产生的内容、引用、产物指针、工具返回值和诊断证据的可寻址信息记录；它与成功、失败或取消的终局状态分离。；该种差可由字段 result_id、run_attempt_id 检验。
includes.en: Includes Run result record records satisfying this reviewed differentia: As an information record, Run result record is distinguished by the fact that it is addressable information containing the content, citations, artifact pointers, tool return values, and diagnostic evidence actually produced by one run attempt; it is separate from the terminal succeeded, failed, or cancelled disposition. The differentia can be checked through fields result_id, run_attempt_id.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす実行成果記録を含みます：情報記録に属する実行成果記録は、次の事実を種差とします：それは、一回の実行試行が実際に生成した内容、引用、成果物ポインター、ツール戻り値、診断証拠を保持するアドレス可能な情報であり、成功、失敗、取消の終局状態とは分離されます。 種差は項目 result_id、run_attempt_id で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 执行结局只是关系 RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome 的另一端；相关联不表示它是执行产出记录。
excludes.en: RunOutcome is only the other endpoint of RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome; relatedness does not make it a RunResult.
excludes.ja: RunOutcome は RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで RunResult にはなりません。

definitions.zh: 唯一标识一条执行产出记录。
definitions.en: Uniquely identifies one run result record.
definitions.ja: 一つの実行成果記録を一意に識別します。

labels.en: Boundary case for Run result record
labels.ja: 実行成果記録の境界例

descriptions.zh: RunOutcome 用作RunResult的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 RunOutcome 的已审查定义是“作为信息记录，执行结局由这一事实区分：它只表达一次执行尝试最终成功、失败或取消，不承载该尝试产生的内容、引用、日志或工具返回值。”。不能因 relation RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome 而把它归入RunResult。
descriptions.en: RunOutcome is the boundary contrast for RunResult. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but RunOutcome's reviewed definition is “Run outcome belongs to the information record category and differs from broader members in that it expresses only whether one run attempt ultimately succeeded, failed, or was cancelled; it does not carry content, citations, logs, or tool return values produced by the attempt.”. relation RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome does not make it a RunResult.
descriptions.ja: RunOutcome は RunResult の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、RunOutcome の審査済み定義は「実行結果状態は情報記録として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは一回の実行試行が最終的に成功、失敗、取消のどれで終わったかだけを表し、その試行が生成した内容、引用、ログ、ツール戻り値を保持しません。」です。relation RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome だけで RunResult にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: RunOutcome 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 RunResult。
expected_result.en: RunOutcome retains its own type; validation must not promote it to RunResult from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: RunOutcome は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで RunResult へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、RunResult-evidences-RunOutcome の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

descriptions.zh: 该合成记录逐项使用执行产出记录节点内“结构与约束”字段中可用的非空样例值，用于验证信息附着于节点而不生成实例图。
descriptions.en: This synthetic record uses every available non-null field example from the Run result record node's structure contract to validate inline information without creating an instance graph.
descriptions.ja: この合成記録は実行成果記録ノードの構造契約にある利用可能な非空フィールド例を用い、インスタンスグラフを作らずノード内情報を検証します。

expected_result.zh: 字段值通过该 Concept 的结构与约束验证，且实例仅作为节点内说明信息显示。
expected_result.en: Field values satisfy the Concept structure contract, and the instance remains explanatory information on the node.
expected_result.ja: フィールド値は Concept の構造契約を満たし、インスタンスはノード内の説明情報として保持されます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 每个字段键与节点字段 ID 完全一致；单值直接取经审查样例，可重复字段按其基数组装为数组。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: Every field key exactly matches a node field ID; scalar values come from reviewed examples and repeatable fields are assembled as arrays according to cardinality.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 各フィールドキーはノードのフィールド ID と一致し、単一値はレビュー済み例から取得し、反復可能フィールドは基数に従って配列化します。

The owner runtime-execution-attempts, semantic kind information, and backbone placement RunAttempt-produces-RunResult are Moonweave design inference choices; the source does not assert those ontology decisions.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RunResult（执行产出记录）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RunResult (Run result record) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RunResult（実行成果記録）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RunResult 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 RunAttempt-produces-RunResult，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=RunAttempt-produces-RunResult；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms RunResult has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone RunAttempt-produces-RunResult, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=RunAttempt-produces-RunResult; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は RunResult の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が RunAttempt-produces-RunResult であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=RunAttempt-produces-RunResult、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: RunResult 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for RunResult were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: RunResult の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 执行产出记录已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Run result record was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 実行成果記録は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 运行预算是以如下事实为区分特征的规范：它记录作用于执行尝试或会话的时间、词元、成本、重试、工具调用、上下文窗口或资源消耗限制。
short_definitions.en: Runtime budget is a specification; its differentiating condition is that it is a runtime limit record for time, token, cost, retry, tool-call, context-window, or resource consumption constraints applied to an execution attempt or session.
short_definitions.ja: 実行予算は仕様の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行試行またはセッションに適用される時間、トークン、費用、再試行、ツール呼び出し、文脈ウィンドウ、資源消費の制約を記録します。

definitions.zh: 运行预算是以如下事实为区分特征的规范：它记录作用于执行尝试或会话的时间、词元、成本、重试、工具调用、上下文窗口或资源消耗限制。
definitions.en: Runtime budget is a specification; its differentiating condition is that it is a runtime limit record for time, token, cost, retry, tool-call, context-window, or resource consumption constraints applied to an execution attempt or session.
definitions.ja: 実行予算は仕様の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行試行またはセッションに適用される時間、トークン、費用、再試行、ツール呼び出し、文脈ウィンドウ、資源消費の制約を記録します。

why_needed.zh: 运行预算为canonical 事实 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt（RuntimeBudget constrains RunAttempt）提供明确端点并保持与 RunAttempt 的定义边界；节点字段 cost 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: runtime budget provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt (RuntimeBudget constrains RunAttempt) while preserving its reviewed boundary from RunAttempt; node fields cost make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: 実行予算はcanonical 事実 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt（RuntimeBudget constrains RunAttempt）の明確な端点を提供し、RunAttempt との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 cost によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的运行预算：运行预算是以如下事实为区分特征的规范：它记录作用于执行尝试或会话的时间、词元、成本、重试、工具调用、上下文窗口或资源消耗限制。；该种差可由字段 cost 检验。
includes.en: Includes runtime budget records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Runtime budget is a specification; its differentiating condition is that it is a runtime limit record for time, token, cost, retry, tool-call, context-window, or resource consumption constraints applied to an execution attempt or session. The differentia can be checked through fields cost.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす実行予算を含みます：実行予算は仕様の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行試行またはセッションに適用される時間、トークン、費用、再試行、ツール呼び出し、文脈ウィンドウ、資源消費の制約を記録します。 種差は項目 cost で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 执行尝试只是关系 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt 的另一端；相关联不表示它是运行预算。
excludes.en: RunAttempt is only the other endpoint of RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt; relatedness does not make it a RuntimeBudget.
excludes.ja: RunAttempt は RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで RuntimeBudget にはなりません。

definitions.en: captures cost as a number scalar on agent-system artifacts, resources, events, policies, or adapter records.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录对应的标量值，用于智能体系统中的产物、资源、事件、策略或适配记录。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は対応するスカラー値を記録し、エージェントシステム内の成果物、資源、イベント、ポリシー、適配記録で使います。

descriptions.zh: 在一次带追踪与重试的任务执行中，系统将运行预算（RuntimeBudget）记录为 RuntimeBudget constrains RunAttempt 的源端点。其已审查定义是“运行预算是以如下事实为区分特征的规范：它记录作用于执行尝试或会话的时间、词元、成本、重试、工具调用、上下文窗口或资源消耗限制”。记录同时写入经审查字段 cost=1.25。
descriptions.en: During a traced task execution with retries, the system records runtime budget (RuntimeBudget) as the source of RuntimeBudget constrains RunAttempt. Its reviewed definition is “Runtime budget is a specification; its differentiating condition is that it is a runtime limit record for time, token, cost, retry, tool-call, context-window, or resource consumption constraints applied to an execution attempt or session”. The record also binds reviewed fields cost=1.25.
descriptions.ja: 追跡と再試行を伴うタスク実行では、システムは実行予算（RuntimeBudget）を RuntimeBudget constrains RunAttempt の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「実行予算は仕様の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは、実行試行またはセッションに適用される時間、トークン、費用、再試行、ツール呼び出し、文脈ウィンドウ、資源消費の制約を記録します」です。記録には審査済み項目 cost=1.25 も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 RuntimeBudget 以及方向保持不变的事实 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt。
expected_result.en: The run can query RuntimeBudget together with direction-preserving fact RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt.
expected_result.ja: この実行では RuntimeBudget と方向を保持した事実 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。

descriptions.zh: RunAttempt 用作RuntimeBudget的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 RunAttempt 的已审查定义是“执行尝试是一种执行；其区分条件是：它是有起止和重试谱系的运行活动；它属于会话但不是会话的子类。”。不能因 relation RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt 而把它归入RuntimeBudget。
descriptions.en: RunAttempt is the boundary contrast for RuntimeBudget. descriptions.ja: RunAttempt は RuntimeBudget の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、RunAttempt の審査済み定義は「実行に属する実行試行は、次の事実を種差とします：それは開始・終了と再試行系譜を持つ活動であり、セッションに属するが RuntimeSession の下位型ではない。」です。relation RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt だけで RuntimeBudget にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: RunAttempt 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 RuntimeBudget。

definitions.zh: 重试活动受规定错误类别、次数、退避与预算条件的重试策略治理。
definitions.en: Retry activity is governed by a retry policy specifying error classes, count, backoff, and budget conditions.
definitions.ja: 再試行活動はエラー種別、回数、バックオフ、予算条件を規定する再試行ポリシーに統治されます。

cardinality_not_applicable_reason.zh: 该语义事实不对所有运行实例施加统一基数。
cardinality_not_applicable_reason.en: This semantic fact does not impose one universal cardinality on every runtime instance.
cardinality_not_applicable_reason.ja: この意味事実はすべての実行インスタンスに一律の基数を課しません。

authority_basis.zh: 重试活动仍由 runtime-execution-attempts 唯一拥有，重试策略仍由 orchestration-routing-control 唯一拥有；governed_by 只建立跨域事实，不转移定义权。若该事实触发运行操作，还必须引用适用的 PolicyDecision 或 AuthorizationGrant。
authority_basis.en: Retry activity remains uniquely owned by runtime-execution-attempts and retry policy by orchestration-routing-control; governed_by establishes a cross-Domain fact without transferring definitional ownership. If the fact triggers a runtime operation, it must also reference an applicable PolicyDecision or AuthorizationGrant.
authority_basis.ja: 再試行活動は runtime-execution-attempts、再試行ポリシーは orchestration-routing-control に引き続き一意に所有されます。governed_by は定義所有権を移さずドメイン横断事実だけを確立し、実行操作を起動する場合は適用される PolicyDecision または AuthorizationGrant も参照します。

protocol_or_resource_context.en: Queries follow the source-to-target direction, endpoint canonical IDs, and source claims of RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy; protocol versions, resource identity, and trust decisions remain attached to the original nodes or relation.
protocol_or_resource_context.ja: 照会は RetryActivity-governed_by-RetryPolicy の source→target 方向、端点 canonical ID、当該関係の出典主張に従い、プロトコル版、資源同一性、信頼判断は元のノードまたは関係に保持されます。

definitions.en: links an execution attempt to the task or work item it realizes, keeping orchestration intent separate from observed runtime execution.
definitions.zh: 把执行尝试连接到它实际实现的任务或工作项，并保持编排意图与观测到的运行执行相互区分。
definitions.ja: 実行試行を、それが実現するタスクまたは作業項目へ接続し、編成上の意図と観測された実行を分離します。

The canonical direction, owner runtime-execution-attempts, relation kind hierarchy, and layout role primary-backbone are Moonweave design inference choices; the source does not assert those ontology decisions.
source_claims.locator: Documentation page > OpenAI Agents SDK Python docs heading and documented conceptual model

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RunAttempt-is_a-Execution（is a）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RunAttempt-is_a-Execution (is a) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RunAttempt-is_a-Execution（is a）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RunAttempt-is_a-Execution 的 predicate 为 is_a，方向为 RunAttempt → Execution，relation kind 为 hierarchy，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 RunAttempt→Execution、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation RunAttempt-is_a-Execution has predicate is_a, direction RunAttempt → Execution, relation kind hierarchy, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction RunAttempt->Execution, predicate=is_a, relation kind=hierarchy, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 RunAttempt-is_a-Execution の predicate が is_a、方向が RunAttempt → Execution、relation kind が hierarchy、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 RunAttempt→Execution、predicate=is_a、relation kind=hierarchy、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: RunAttempt-is_a-Execution 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for RunAttempt-is_a-Execution were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: RunAttempt-is_a-Execution の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RunAttempt-produces-RunResult（produces）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RunAttempt-produces-RunResult (produces) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RunAttempt-produces-RunResult（produces）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RunAttempt-produces-RunResult 的 predicate 为 produces，方向为 RunAttempt → RunResult，relation kind 为 causal，layout role 为 primary-backbone，并满足“canonical 方向 RunAttempt→RunResult、predicate=produces、relation kind=causal、layout role=primary-backbone”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation RunAttempt-produces-RunResult has predicate produces, direction RunAttempt → RunResult, relation kind causal, layout role primary-backbone, and invariants “canonical direction RunAttempt->RunResult, predicate=produces, relation kind=causal, layout role=primary-backbone”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 RunAttempt-produces-RunResult の predicate が produces、方向が RunAttempt → RunResult、relation kind が causal、layout role が primary-backbone であり、「canonical 方向 RunAttempt→RunResult、predicate=produces、relation kind=causal、layout role=primary-backbone」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

definitions.zh: 运行预算限制尝试可消耗的时间、令牌、成本与重试。

descriptions.en: In synthetic run RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt-scenario-001, RuntimeBudget explicitly constrains RunAttempt; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: A runtime budget governs the time, tokens, cost, and retries available to an attempt.

expected_result.zh: 该对象按定义被识别为constrains。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt（constrains）由 runtime-execution-attempts 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由某项工作的实际 Execution、尝试序号和血缘、预算消耗、Result 或 Outcome 决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt (constrains) is owned by runtime-execution-attempts for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by an actual Execution of work, attempt number and lineage, budget use, Result, or Outcome.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt（constrains）を runtime-execution-attempts が「対象の同一性が作業の実際の Execution、試行番号と系譜、予算消費、Result、Outcome で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt 的 predicate 为 constrains，方向为 RuntimeBudget → RunAttempt，relation kind 为 governance，layout role 为 cross-link，并满足“canonical 方向 RuntimeBudget→RunAttempt、predicate=constrains、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms Relation RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt has predicate constrains, direction RuntimeBudget → RunAttempt, relation kind governance, layout role cross-link, and invariants “canonical direction RuntimeBudget->RunAttempt, predicate=constrains, relation kind=governance, layout role=cross-link”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は関係 RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt の predicate が constrains、方向が RuntimeBudget → RunAttempt、relation kind が governance、layout role が cross-link であり、「canonical 方向 RuntimeBudget→RunAttempt、predicate=constrains、relation kind=governance、layout role=cross-link」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: RuntimeBudget-constrains-RunAttempt の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

definitions.en: links an execution attempt to the concrete container, sandbox, working directory, model/tool availability, and configuration used at runtime.
definitions.zh: 把执行尝试连接到运行时实际使用的容器、沙箱、工作目录、模型或工具可用性以及配置。
definitions.ja: 実行試行を、実行時に使われた具体的なコンテナ、サンドボックス、作業ディレクトリ、モデルやツールの可用性、設定へ接続します。

distinct_fact_rationale.zh: occurs_in 固定尝试实际发生的宿主环境与时间边界；uses_runtime_environment 记录额外运行依赖，二者不可互推。
distinct_fact_rationale.en: occurs_in fixes the host and temporal boundary of execution; uses_runtime_environment records an additional runtime dependency, and neither entails the other.
distinct_fact_rationale.ja: occurs_in は実行のホストと時間境界を固定し、uses_runtime_environment は追加実行依存を記録するため、相互に導出できません。
